name: 2021 Iranian Presidential Election
description: The 2021 presidential election was marked by the [Guardian Council](/orgs/guardian-council)'s disqualification of all major moderate and reformist candidates, including [Ali Larijani](/people/ali-larijani) and [Mostafa Tajzadeh](/people/mostafa-tajzadeh). Only seven of 592 applicants were approved to run. [Ebrahim Raisi](/people/ebrahim-raisi) won with 62% of the vote, but turnout was a record-low 48.8%, with widespread calls for boycott. The election was widely seen as engineered to ensure Raisi's victory and consolidate hardliner control of all branches of government.
editorial_notes: Record-low turnout. Widely seen as engineered outcome.
